overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a photorealistic mountain valley during golden hour. The character walks along a stream toward a large waterfall, wades through shallow water, observes the cascade up close, then turns to explore a rocky shore with abandoned metal crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy stream bank in mountain valley

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy stream bank toward distant mountains

entered.detail: large white gnarled tree with no leaves
tall red-rock mountains with layered formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a grassy stream bank in a wide mountain valley during golden hour. A distinctive dead white tree stands on the left while red-rock mountains rise in the distance ahead.

events.description: character steps from grassy bank into shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the waterfall

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down cliff face

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from grass to shallow water, wading through the stream toward a large waterfall that grows progressively larger in the frame. The dead tree passes out of view behind the character.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with heavy mist and spray

events.description: character stops and looks up at the waterfall

agents.ego_description: standing at the waterfall base looking up at the cascade

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the waterfall base where mist diffuses the golden light. The camera pans upward to take in the full height of the cascade as water sprays around the rocky pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with abandoned supply crates

events.description: character turns away from waterfall and walks toward rocky area

agents.ego_description: turning away from the waterfall and walking toward metal crates on the rocky shore

entered.detail: abandoned rectangular supply containers with metallic surfaces

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the waterfall and walks toward a rocky outcrop where metal crates are scattered. The terrain shifts from water to gravel and grass as the character explores the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a mountain valley that transitions from a peaceful stream bank to the misty base of a towering waterfall and finally to a rugged, debris-strewn shore. It begins with the character walking along a grassy bank past a dead white tree, with red-rock mountains looming in the distance under the golden hour light. As the character leaves the grass to wade through the shallow stream, the dead tree recedes from view and the waterfall grows progressively larger in the frame. The scene then reaches the base of the cascade, where the camera pans upward through diffusing mist to capture the full height of the falling water and the spray of the rocky pool. Finally, the character turns away from the falls, moving across shifting terrain from water to gravel and grass toward a rocky outcrop scattered with abandoned metal crates.
